info.title: M8 Identity Manager API
info.summary: Proof broker, credential wallet, trust policy, and anonymous identity API.
info.description: M8 runs on AdonisJS and exposes a v1 JSON API. Protected endpoints use Bearer access tokens signed with jose. Runtime issuer and audience are configured with JWT_ISSUER and JWT_AUDIENCE; secrets are never exposed through the API contract.

bearerAuth.description: M8 access token returned by /v1/sessions/start or /v1/sessions/refresh.

publicSignals.description: Circuit public signals. Index 0 is the public commitment, index 1 is current year, index 2 is the age threshold.

get.summary: Render Scalar API documentation.
Return the committed OpenAPI contract.
Health check.

post.summary: Start an OAuth-gated M8 session.

200.description: Development/test session and tokens when the dev bootstrap feature flag is enabled.

202.description: OAuth authorization started. No M8 session is created and tokens are issued only from the OAuth callback.

get.summary: Complete ATProto OAuth callback.

200.description: OAuth callback result with issued tokens.

get.summary: Return the authenticated session.

200.description: New access and rotated refresh token.

Approve a grant.

200.description: Issued credential. The response never includes birthYear, salt, or witness material.

409.description: The public commitment is already registered.

post.summary: Verify an INE age ZKP.

403.description: Alias is not active for this person.

x-m8-types.registryCheck: npm returned E404 for https://registry.npmjs.org/@para%2fm8-types in this environment, so this contract keeps local schemas until the private registry or package source is configured.
